revision.comment: No need to track this legitimate, documented usage. This category was added without discussion, and it appears to not be useful.
revision.text:
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{Documentation}}

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{Documentation}}
style="text-align:left"| This template saves typing the following text: style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}}
style="text-align:left"| This template saves typing the following text: style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}}
style="text-align:left"| This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}}

style="text-align:left"| ==== Usage ==== This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} ==== See also ==== *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument [[Category:typing-aid templates|Right]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates|Right]] [[ja:Template:Right]]

style="text-align:left"| ==== Usage ==== This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} ==== See also ==== *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument [[Category:typing-aid templates|Right]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates|Right]]

revision.comment: Robot: moving pages out of redirected category
revision.text: style="text-align:left"| ==== Usage ==== This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} ==== See also ==== *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument [[Category:typing-aid templates|Right]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Right]]

revision.comment: Sorting Left as Right strikes me as cack-handed
revision.text: style="text-align:left"| ==== Usage ==== This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} ==== See also ==== *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

style="text-align:left"| ==== Usage ==== This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} ==== See also ==== *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]] [[mk:Шаблон:Лево]]

revision.comment: [[User:Addbot|Bot:]] Migrating 1 interwiki links, now provided by [[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] on [[d:q10980182]]
revision.text: style="text-align:left"| ==== Usage ==== This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} ==== See also ==== *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

style="text-align:left"| ==== Usage ==== This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} ==== See also ==== *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument *{{tl|Right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

style="text-align:left"| == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} == See also == *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument *{{tl|Center}} *{{tl|Right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

style="text-align:left"| == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text produces:
Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text. ===Table=== {| class="wikitable" !colspan="3"| Header text |- | {{Left2|Left2}} || {{Center|Center}} || {{Right|Right}} |} == See also == *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument *{{tl|Center}} *{{tl|Right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

style="text-align:left"| == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text produces:
Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text. ===Table=== {| class="wikitable" !colspan="3"| Header text |- | {{Left|Left}} || {{Center|Center}} || {{Right|Right}} |} == See also == *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument *{{tl|Center}} *{{tl|Right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

style="text-align:left"| == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text produces:
Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text. ===Table=== {| class="wikitable" !colspan="3"| Header text |- |{{Left}}Left || {{Center|Center}} || {{Right|Right}} |} == See also == *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument *{{tl|Center}} *{{tl|Right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

style="text-align:left"| == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text produces:
Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text. ===Table=== {| class="wikitable" !colspan="3"| Header text |- |{{Left}}Left || {{Center|Center}} || {{Right|Right}} |} == See also == *{{tl|left2}} - same as this, uses div tags instead of modifying cell properties *{{tl|center}} *{{tl|right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

revision.comment: /* Table */ Set table width so that alignment was visible
revision.text:
style="text-align:left"| == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text produces:
Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text. ===Table=== {| class="wikitable" width=300px !colspan="3"| Header text |- | {{Left}}Left || {{Center|Center}} || {{Right|Right}} |} == See also == *{{tl|left2}} - same as this, uses div tags instead of modifying cell properties *{{tl|center}} *{{tl|right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

revision.comment: Added optional parameter, so that left-aligned content could be used inside template, akin to usage for [[template:center]] and [[template:right]].
revision.text:
style="text-align:left"|{{{1|}}} == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text produces:
Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text. ===Table=== {| class="wikitable" width=300px !colspan="3"| Header text |- | {{Left}}Left || {{Center|Center}} || {{Right|Right}} |} == See also == *{{tl|left2}} - same as this, uses div tags instead of modifying cell properties *{{tl|center}} *{{tl|right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]
<includeonly>style="text-align:left"|{{{1|}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

<includeonly>style="text-align:left"|{{{1|}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Tfm/dated|page=Left|otherpage=left2|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2015 March 5#Template:Left}}
{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: track with [[Category:Pages using left with optional parameters]] for tfd
revision.text:
<includeonly>style="text-align:left"|{{{1|}}}{{#if:{{{1|}}}|[[Category:Pages using left with optional parameters]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Tfm/dated|page=Left|otherpage=left2|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2015 March 5#Template:Left}}
{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: per tfm, now a functional merged version, so all that is left to do is redirect left2 here and we are done :)
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{1|}}} |
{{{1|}}}
[[Category:Pages using left with optional parameters]] |style="text-align:left"{{!}} }} {{Tfm/dated|page=Left|otherpage=left2|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2015 March 5#Template:Left}} {{documentation}}

{{#if:{{{1|}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{!}} }} {{documentation}}

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{1|}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{documentation}}

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: fix linter errors (misc tidy formatting error, div inside of span)
revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |{{{1|}}} |style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{documentation}}

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}}[[Category:Pages using left with no input arguments]] }} {{Documentation}}

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}}[[Category:Pages using left with no arguments]] }} {{Documentation}}

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}}[[Category:Pages using left with no arguments| ]] }} {{Documentation}}

revision.text:
style="text-align:left"|{{{1|}}} == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text produces:
Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text. ===Table=== {| class="wikitable" width=300px !colspan="3"| Header text |- | {{Left}}Left || {{Center|Center}} || {{Right|Right}} |} == See also == *{{tl|left2}} - same as this, uses div tags instead of modifying cell properties *{{tl|center}} *{{tl|right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]
<includeonly>style="text-align:left"|{{{1|}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

<includeonly>style="text-align:left"|{{{1|}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Tfm/dated|page=Left|otherpage=left2|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2015 March 5#Template:Left}}
{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: track with [[Category:Pages using left with optional parameters]] for tfd
revision.text:
<includeonly>style="text-align:left"|{{{1|}}}{{#if:{{{1|}}}|[[Category:Pages using left with optional parameters]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Tfm/dated|page=Left|otherpage=left2|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2015 March 5#Template:Left}}
{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: per tfm, now a functional merged version, so all that is left to do is redirect left2 here and we are done :)
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{1|}}} |
{{{1|}}}
[[Category:Pages using left with optional parameters]] |style="text-align:left"{{!}} }} {{Tfm/dated|page=Left|otherpage=left2|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2015 March 5#Template:Left}} {{documentation}}

{{#if:{{{1|}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{!}} }} {{documentation}}

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{1|}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{documentation}}

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: fix linter errors (misc tidy formatting error, div inside of span)
revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |{{{1|}}} |style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{documentation}}

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}}[[Category:Pages using left with no input arguments]] }} {{Documentation}}

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}}[[Category:Pages using left with no arguments]] }} {{Documentation}}

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}}[[Category:Pages using left with no arguments| ]] }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: No need to track this legitimate, documented usage. This category was added without discussion, and it appears to not be useful.
revision.text:
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{Documentation}}

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{Documentation}}
style="text-align:left"| This template saves typing the following text: style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}}
style="text-align:left"| This template saves typing the following text: style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}}
style="text-align:left"| This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}}

style="text-align:left"| ==== Usage ==== This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} ==== See also ==== *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument [[Category:typing-aid templates|Right]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates|Right]] [[ja:Template:Right]]

style="text-align:left"| ==== Usage ==== This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} ==== See also ==== *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument [[Category:typing-aid templates|Right]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates|Right]]

revision.comment: Robot: moving pages out of redirected category
revision.text: style="text-align:left"| ==== Usage ==== This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} ==== See also ==== *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument [[Category:typing-aid templates|Right]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Right]]

revision.comment: Sorting Left as Right strikes me as cack-handed
revision.text: style="text-align:left"| ==== Usage ==== This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} ==== See also ==== *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

style="text-align:left"| ==== Usage ==== This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} ==== See also ==== *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]] [[mk:Шаблон:Лево]]

revision.comment: [[User:Addbot|Bot:]] Migrating 1 interwiki links, now provided by [[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] on [[d:q10980182]]
revision.text: style="text-align:left"| ==== Usage ==== This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} ==== See also ==== *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

style="text-align:left"| ==== Usage ==== This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} ==== See also ==== *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument *{{tl|Right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

style="text-align:left"| == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} == See also == *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument *{{tl|Center}} *{{tl|Right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

style="text-align:left"| == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text produces:
Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text. ===Table=== {| class="wikitable" !colspan="3"| Header text |- | {{Left2|Left2}} || {{Center|Center}} || {{Right|Right}} |} == See also == *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument *{{tl|Center}} *{{tl|Right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

style="text-align:left"| == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text produces:
Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text. ===Table=== {| class="wikitable" !colspan="3"| Header text |- | {{Left|Left}} || {{Center|Center}} || {{Right|Right}} |} == See also == *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument *{{tl|Center}} *{{tl|Right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

style="text-align:left"| == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text produces:
Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text. ===Table=== {| class="wikitable" !colspan="3"| Header text |- |{{Left}}Left || {{Center|Center}} || {{Right|Right}} |} == See also == *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument *{{tl|Center}} *{{tl|Right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

style="text-align:left"| == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text produces:
Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text. ===Table=== {| class="wikitable" !colspan="3"| Header text |- |{{Left}}Left || {{Center|Center}} || {{Right|Right}} |} == See also == *{{tl|left2}} - same as this, uses div tags instead of modifying cell properties *{{tl|center}} *{{tl|right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

revision.comment: /* Table */ Set table width so that alignment was visible
revision.text:
style="text-align:left"| == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text produces:
Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text. ===Table=== {| class="wikitable" width=300px !colspan="3"| Header text |- | {{Left}}Left || {{Center|Center}} || {{Right|Right}} |} == See also == *{{tl|left2}} - same as this, uses div tags instead of modifying cell properties *{{tl|center}} *{{tl|right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

revision.comment: Added optional parameter, so that left-aligned content could be used inside template, akin to usage for [[template:center]] and [[template:right]].
revision.text:
style="text-align:left"|{{{1|}}} == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text produces:
Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text. ===Table=== {| class="wikitable" width=300px !colspan="3"| Header text |- | {{Left}}Left || {{Center|Center}} || {{Right|Right}} |} == See also == *{{tl|left2}} - same as this, uses div tags instead of modifying cell properties *{{tl|center}} *{{tl|right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]
<includeonly>style="text-align:left"|{{{1|}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

<includeonly>style="text-align:left"|{{{1|}}}</includeonly><noinclude>

revision.text: style="text-align:left"| ==== Usage ==== This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} ==== See also ==== *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

style="text-align:left"| ==== Usage ==== This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} ==== See also ==== *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument *{{tl|Right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

style="text-align:left"| == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} == See also == *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument *{{tl|Center}} *{{tl|Right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

style="text-align:left"| == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text produces:
Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text. ===Table=== {| class="wikitable" !colspan="3"| Header text |- | {{Left2|Left2}} || {{Center|Center}} || {{Right|Right}} |} == See also == *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument *{{tl|Center}} *{{tl|Right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

style="text-align:left"| == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text produces:
Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text. ===Table=== {| class="wikitable" !colspan="3"| Header text |- | {{Left|Left}} || {{Center|Center}} || {{Right|Right}} |} == See also == *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument *{{tl|Center}} *{{tl|Right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

style="text-align:left"| == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text produces:
Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text. ===Table=== {| class="wikitable" !colspan="3"| Header text |- |{{Left}}Left || {{Center|Center}} || {{Right|Right}} |} == See also == *{{tiw|left2}} - same as this, but takes the text itself as an argument *{{tl|Center}} *{{tl|Right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

style="text-align:left"| == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text produces:
Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text. ===Table=== {| class="wikitable" !colspan="3"| Header text |- |{{Left}}Left || {{Center|Center}} || {{Right|Right}} |} == See also == *{{tl|left2}} - same as this, uses div tags instead of modifying cell properties *{{tl|center}} *{{tl|right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

revision.comment: /* Table */ Set table width so that alignment was visible
revision.text:
style="text-align:left"| == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text produces:
Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text. ===Table=== {| class="wikitable" width=300px !colspan="3"| Header text |- | {{Left}}Left || {{Center|Center}} || {{Right|Right}} |} == See also == *{{tl|left2}} - same as this, uses div tags instead of modifying cell properties *{{tl|center}} *{{tl|right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]

revision.comment: Added optional parameter, so that left-aligned content could be used inside template, akin to usage for [[template:center]] and [[template:right]].
revision.text:
style="text-align:left"|{{{1|}}} == Usage == This template saves typing the following text (in a table): style="text-align:left"| To use, type: {{left}} Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text produces:
Some {{left|left-aligned words}} in text. ===Table=== {| class="wikitable" width=300px !colspan="3"| Header text |- | {{Left}}Left || {{Center|Center}} || {{Right|Right}} |} == See also == *{{tl|left2}} - same as this, uses div tags instead of modifying cell properties *{{tl|center}} *{{tl|right}} [[Category:typing-aid templates|Left]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|Left]]
<includeonly>style="text-align:left"|{{{1|}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

<includeonly>style="text-align:left"|{{{1|}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Tfm/dated|page=Left|otherpage=left2|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2015 March 5#Template:Left}}
{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: track with [[Category:Pages using left with optional parameters]] for tfd
revision.text:
<includeonly>style="text-align:left"|{{{1|}}}{{#if:{{{1|}}}|[[Category:Pages using left with optional parameters]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Tfm/dated|page=Left|otherpage=left2|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2015 March 5#Template:Left}}
{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: per tfm, now a functional merged version, so all that is left to do is redirect left2 here and we are done :)
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{1|}}} |
{{{1|}}}
[[Category:Pages using left with optional parameters]] |style="text-align:left"{{!}} }} {{Tfm/dated|page=Left|otherpage=left2|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2015 March 5#Template:Left}} {{documentation}}

{{#if:{{{1|}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{!}} }} {{documentation}}

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{1|}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{documentation}}

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: fix linter errors (misc tidy formatting error, div inside of span)
revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |{{{1|}}} |style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{documentation}}

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}}[[Category:Pages using left with no input arguments]] }} {{Documentation}}

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}}[[Category:Pages using left with no arguments]] }} {{Documentation}}

{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}}[[Category:Pages using left with no arguments| ]] }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: No need to track this legitimate, documented usage. This category was added without discussion, and it appears to not be useful.
revision.text:
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{Documentation}}

{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
{{{1|}}}
|style="text-align:left"{{{{{|safesubst:}}}!}} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23511227343|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifeq:{{{1|a}}}|{{{1|b}}} |
